name: codex-learning-system
description: Codex-native CBT learning plugin with SQLite study tracking, wrong-note reports, and optional Notion sync planning.

interface.shortDescription: Run CBT-style study sessions inside Codex.
interface.longDescription: A local-first Codex plugin for certification study. It runs CBT-style sessions, records answers in SQLite, generates wrong-note reports, and prepares optional Notion sync plans without exposing personal study records by default.
defaultPrompt: Finish my study session and summarize misses.
Prepare a Notion wrong-note sync plan.
